blocks.text: Glimt charge into San Siro — Norway's greatest CL night beckons
By some metrics, Bodo/Glimt rank among the world's top clubs right now. A 3-1 lead to San Siro tonight: Norwegian football history is 90 minutes away.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League Wednesday
items: ⚽ Wed 18:45 — Atalanta vs Borussia Dortmund — Atalanta need two at home to level, Dortmund lead 2-0
⚽ Wed 21:00 — PSG vs Monaco — French derby, PSG ahead 3-2 but Monaco very much alive
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Benfica — narrow lead, Bernabéu braced for a tense night
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Juventus vs Galatasaray — Galatasaray in control, Juve need four goals
